use_cases: Dynamic hero section backgrounds with interactive liquid crystal shader effects
Interactive landing page visuals that respond to mouse movement
Creative portfolio backgrounds with continuous WebGL animation
Visual effects component for media and entertainment web applications
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered liquid crystal shader effect that renders fluid, refractive animations on a full-screen canvas using custom fragment shaders. The component uses raw WebGL with a custom hook for state management, creating a crystalline liquid aesthetic with interactive mouse-responsive behavior and continuous animation, making it ideal for hero sections and creative landing pages.
